logger.doc:name: before fetching case Logger
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "before logger for fetching case", payload: #[payload]
transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "end logger for fetching case"

logger.doc:name: start Logger
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], payload: #[payload], message: "before insert covid case"

db:insert.db:sql: insert into cvd_case_master (source, case_type, first_name, last_name, phone, email, date_of_birth, national_id, national_id_type, street_address, city, state, postal, country, create_date, update_date, create_by, update_by) values(:source, :case_type, :first_name, :last_name, :phone, :email,:date_of_birth, :national_id, :national_id_type, :street_address, :city, :state, :postal, :country, :create_date,:update_date,:create_by, :update_by)

logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "after insert covid case"

logger.doc:name: Logger before updating covid-case
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "before updating covid case", payload: #[payload]

db:update.doc:name: Update Covid Case
db:update.db:sql: update cvd_case_master set source=:source, case_type=:case_type, first_name=:first_name, last_name=:last_name, phone=:phone, email=:email, date_of_birth=:date_of_birth, national_id=:national_id, national_id_type=:national_id_type, street_address=:street_address, city=:city, state=:state, postal=:postal, country=:country, update_date=:update_date, update_by=:update_by where case_id=:case_id

logger.doc:name: Logger after update covid case
logger.message: transactionId: #[vars.transactionId], correlationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "after updating covid case", payload: #[payload]
